description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The net amount due to or from a Prime Agent in an Initial Calculation is an Agreed Amount if the absolute value of the percentage difference between the amounts in the Initial Calculation and the Independent Calculation is less than or equal to the Allowed Deviation (see [A.2.

.1.2.1.3.3 - Allowed Deviation](2e471685-fec5-4306-8747-a50dbbdd5c70)). The net amount due to or from a Prime Agent in an Independent Calculation is also an Agreed Amount if there is no Initial Calculation.
